name: clipy
description: Read your Clipy screen recordings: search, transcripts, AI summaries, and key moments with frames.
long_description: Clipy is an agent-readable screen recorder (free, no watermark — Mac, Chrome, web). This extension gives Claude access to your Clipy recordings: search your library, fetch timestamped transcripts, AI summaries, and key moments with the actual video frames (click markers burned in) as inline images. The `get_agent_context` tool bundles everything in one call — e.g. "read this bug-report recording and ship the fix." Read tools need the default `recordings:read` scope; the record and transcript-edit tools require a key with the `ingest` scope (enforced server-side), so a `recordings:read`-only key can never create, modify, or delete recordings.

api_key.title: Clipy API Key
api_key.description: Create a free API key at https://clipy.online/settings/api-keys (looks like clipy_sk_live_…).
